title: Chapter 53
text: Dear Reader, I want to thank you guys from the bottom of my heart for taking a chance on Model Behavior, and for giving me the opportunity to share this story with you. I couldn’t do this without you! I would also be very grateful if you could take the time to leave a review. It’s amazing how such a little thing like a review can be such a huge help to an author! Thank you so much!!! -Kelsie
